heading: Imposition of sanctions with respect to the provision of underwriting services or insurance or reinsurance for activities or persons with respect to which sanctions have been imposed
label: 8805 Imposition of sanctions with respect to the provision of underwriting services or insurance or reinsurance for activities or persons with respect to which sanctions have been imposed

children.label: A
children.text: for any activity with respect to Iran for which sanctions have been imposed under this chapter, the International Emergency Economic Powers Act ( et seq.), the Iran Sanctions Act of 1996, the Comprehensive Iran Sanctions, Accountability, and Divestment Act of 2010 ( et seq.), the Iran Threat Reduction and Syria Human Rights Act of 2012 ( et seq.), the Iran, North Korea, and Syria Nonproliferation Act (; note), or any other provision of law relating to the imposition of sanctions with respect to Iran;50 U.S.C. 170122 U.S.C. 850122 U.S.C. 8701Public Law 106–17850 U.S.C. 1701

children.label: i
children.text: with respect to, or for the benefit of any activity in the energy, shipping, or shipbuilding sectors of Iran for which sanctions are imposed under this chapter;

children.label: ii
children.text: for the sale, supply, or transfer to or from Iran of materials described in for which sanctions are imposed under this chapter; orsection 8804(d) of this title

children.label: I
children.text: Iran’s proliferation of weapons of mass destruction or delivery systems for weapons of mass destruction; or

children.label: II
children.text: Iran’s support for international terrorism; or

children.label: C
children.text: to or for any Iranian person included on the list of specially designated nationals and blocked persons maintained by the Office of Foreign Assets Control of the Department of the Treasury (other than an Iranian financial institution described in subsection (b)).

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 2 Exception
children.text: The requirement to impose sanctions under paragraph (1) shall not include the authority to impose sanctions relating to the importation of goods under paragraph (8)(A) or (12) of section 6(a) of the Iran Sanctions Act of 1996, and any sanction relating to the importation of goods shall not count for purposes of the requirement to impose sanctions under paragraph (1).
Iran’s proliferation of weapons of mass destruction or delivery systems for weapons of mass destruction;
Iran’s support for international terrorism; or

children.heading: Humanitarian exception
children.label: c Humanitarian exception
children.text: The President may not impose sanctions under subsection (a) for the provision of underwriting services or insurance or reinsurance for a transaction for the sale of agricultural commodities, food, medicine, or medical devices to Iran or for the provision of humanitarian assistance to the people of Iran.

children.heading: Exception for underwriters and insurance providers exercising due diligence
children.label: d Exception for underwriters and insurance providers exercising due diligence
children.text: The President may not impose sanctions under subparagraph (A) or (C) or clause (i) or (ii) of subparagraph (B) of subsection (a)(1) with respect to a person that provides underwriting services or insurance or reinsurance if the President determines that the person has exercised due diligence in establishing and enforcing official policies, procedures, and controls to ensure that the person does not underwrite or enter into a contract to provide insurance or reinsurance for an activity described in subparagraph (A) of that subsection or to or for any person described in subparagraph (C) or clause (i) or (ii) of subparagraph (B) of that subsection.

children.label: A
children.text: determines that such a waiver is vital to the national security of the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: submits to the appropriate congressional committees a report providing a justification for the waiver.

children.heading: Form of report
children.label: 2 Form of report
children.text: Each report submitted under paragraph (1)(B) shall be submitted in unclassified form, but may include a classified annex.
